intentSynonyms: get a tasks for section in asana
look up a tasks for section in asana
fetch a single tasks for section in asana
view one specific tasks for section in asana
get tasks for section in asana
list tasks in a section in asana
description: List tasks in a project section. Supports pagination with limit and offset.

section_gid.description: Section GID to list tasks for

limit.description: Maximum number of tasks to return (default 20, max 100)

offset.description: Pagination offset from a previous response
